prompt: Orchestrator composes reviewer-fixes-issues handoff for story 9-14 Kafka producer options (4 findings).

assertions.text: Has a clearly labeled Task section stating what the reviewer must do this round
Has a Why-this-matters section explaining user-visible or architectural consequence
Pastes the reviewer's prior 4 findings substantively (not summarized to 'apply the 4 fixes')
Mentions all 4 specific findings: UT-001 assertions, mapProducerOptions/mapSendOptions alias, mapSendOptions export, AC4 headers invariant
Names knowledge sources: CLAUDE.md and docs/kafka-conventions.md (or the specific sections)
Invokes at least one relevant skill by name (typescript-clean-code, typescript-unit-testing, or bmad-bmm-code-review)
Defines success criteria (tests pass, lint/typecheck clean, or equivalent concrete done-check)
